emotional_tone: Grounded, trustworthy, approachable, calm. Contrasts the high anxiety of volatility trading.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding to create breathing room. Calmness over density.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2C4C3B] text-white hover:bg-[#1E362A] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-[#EAE7E0] text-[#1A2421] hover:bg-[#D1CDC3] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3
buttons.accent: bg-[#C05746] text-white hover:bg-[#A64B3C] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-3

cards.default: bg-[#F7F5F0] border border-[#D1CDC3] rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 rounded-xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
cards.interactive: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 border border-[#D1CDC3] hover:border-[#4A5D54]

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#D1CDC3] rounded-md focus:border-[#2C4C3B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2C4C3B] px-4 py-2

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#F7F5F0]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D1CDC3]/50

motion.entrance: framer-motion staggered fade-up with spring physics
motion.marquee: slow, organic editorial ribbon using react-fast-marquee. Pale sage bg, dark olive text.

textures.noise: Subtle SVG noise overlay on hero sections for a tactile, earthy feel.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, matched to text color.

images.description: Golden sand dunes with rippling patterns, used with heavy bg-[#F7F5F0]/80 overlay to provide subtle organic texture without distracting from content.
Woman working at a desk in a plant-filled studio, representing the calm, educational focus of SimuTrade.
Minimalist view of a modern building facade against a clear blue sky, symbolizing structure, risk management, and stability.
Black and white abstract texture of rippling sand dunes, used for background in data/analytics sections with a terracotta tint.

logos.instruction: Use purely CSS/Typography for partner logos. Make them monochromatic (#4A5D54), text-based, and small. Do not use external image placeholders.

specific_page_instructions.landing_page: Use the Tetris bento grid. The hero must feature the sand dunes image with a strong #F7F5F0/80 overlay. Introduce the 'Marquee' for market data but style it like an 'Editorial Ribbon' (slow, serif/mono text, earthy colors).
specific_page_instructions.onboarding_wizard: Clean, distraction-free layout. Glassmorphism progress bar. Step 1: Profile. Step 2: Risk Tolerance. Step 3: Tutorial. Use warm terracotta accents to guide the user.
specific_page_instructions.dashboard_&_trading: The 'Control Room' grid. Dense but with the calm earthy palette. Charts should use Recharts with colors: #2C4C3B (Up/Main), #C05746 (Down/Volatility). NO red/green default finance colors. Use Moss and Terracotta instead. Prominent 'Demo Mode' disclaimer in the sticky header.
specific_page_instructions.learn_page: Editorial blog style. Use pure HTML + Tailwind for article layouts. Generous line-height (`leading-relaxed`), large initial drop caps, and inset images with rounded-lg borders.
specific_page_instructions.file_extension_note: Since the environment uses .js files, ensure all React components are written in JS/JSX, not TSX.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Terracotta (#C05746) on Bone White (#F7F5F0) is APCA compliant for large text, but check button text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="trade-submit-button"`).
